name: Kelsey
title: Entropy Regulator
core_trait: Slow, steady presence that absorbs chaos
real_summary: Kelsey is quiet, kind, and soft-spoken. He often comes into work a little sleepy with bed head, moving at his own slower pace. He’s frequently given the less desirable tasks, but he handles them without complaint. Despite being overlooked or scolded at times, he remains gentle and consistent.
power_summary: Kelsey absorbs excess energy from the environment, slowing chaos and preventing overload by dispersing intensity over time.
activation_trigger: High activity, stress, or overwhelming pace

power_translation.real_world: Moving slower than others and staying calm under pressure
power_translation.comic_world: Acts as a buffer that dampens energy spikes and prevents system overload

quirks_and_ticks: often slightly sleepy or spaced out
gets stuck with bathroom duty frequently

uniform.details: tucked in, Clark’s Pump-n-Shop in UK blue letters, no border

effects: energy trails that fade instead of burst
soft fields that dampen surrounding activity

team_dynamic.mavis: absorbs her overflow so she can keep going
team_dynamic.amanda: slows her intensity slightly when needed
team_dynamic.debbie: protected and supported by her leadership

notes: Not incompetent—essential for preventing burnout and overload
